message:
feat(shared): add TypeScript client SDK codegen

- Add client codegen (client.ts):
  - Generate FlywheelClient class with typed methods
  - Support path parameter substitution
  - Handle streaming endpoints with AsyncGenerator
  - Include authentication token handling
  - Generate type definitions by category
- Complete codegen suite: REST, tRPC, OpenAPI, WebSocket, Client

Part of flywheel_gateway-2kf (Command Registry + Codegen System)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
